permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to read local files (e.g., abstract.txt, citation.txt, paper.md, README.md) from your workspace. Allow?
This skill needs to create or modify local files (e.g., paper.md, paper.html, README.md with updated YAML frontmatter). Allow?
This skill needs to execute shell commands and Python scripts (e.g., paper_manager.py, huggingface-cli, uv add). Allow?
This skill needs to read environment variables (specifically HF_TOKEN) to authenticate with Hugging Face. Allow?
This skill needs to read the HF_TOKEN secret/credential to authenticate API calls to Hugging Face Hub. Allow?
This skill needs to fetch data from external URLs (arXiv, Hugging Face Hub) to check paper status, retrieve metadata, and search papers. Allow?
This skill needs to submit data to Hugging Face Hub APIs (e.g., indexing papers, linking papers, claiming authorship, toggling visibility). Allow?
This skill needs to call external APIs (Hugging Face Hub API, arXiv API) to manage papers, retrieve metadata, and perform linking operations. Allow?
This skill needs to install Python packages (huggingface_hub, pyyaml, requests, markdown, python-dotenv) via uv or pip. Allow?
This skill requires outbound network access to reach Hugging Face Hub and arXiv services. Allow?
